content: Diagnose: rembg alone can only strip background from whole person, not isolate individual garments → complaint #2 needs true semantic parser
Verify 8 GiB pod memory limit → enough for local SegFormer b3 (peak 1.36 GB)
Re-enable local SegFormer (USE_LOCAL_CLOTHING_PARSER=true) now that OOM risk is eliminated
Live E2E test: 0004.jpg → 3 distinct items (coat, pants, shoes), no duplicates, pixel-perfect per-garment PNG cutouts
